refnamediv.refpurpose: Returns the Nth interior ring (hole) of a Polygon.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Returns the Nth interior ring (hole) of a POLYGON geometry as a LINESTRING. The index starts at 1. Returns NULL if the geometry is not a polygon or the index is out of range.

note.para: This function does not support MULTIPOLYGONs. For MULTIPOLYGONs use in conjunction with or

refsection.title: Examples
